findings.title: Slab allocator metadata layout reversed but heap state inference blocked
findings.statement: GDB breakpoints on the allocator init path confirmed slab header field offsets (size, free-count, next-free pointer). However, the allocator uses a multi-tier topology with thread-local caches and a central arena, making heap state inference after a controlled free sequence infeasible without a custom GDB Python walker script targeting this specific variant.

evidence.summary: debug_gdb_commands: breakpoints on allocator init confirm slab header offsets; multi-tier topology blocks further progress
